text.title: Client Visibility vs Velocity Tradeoff Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Client Visibility vs Velocity Tradeoff end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: tier-clients
step.action: Assign tier per client: HIGH / MID / LOW.

step.name: write-cadence-policy
step.action: Write tier-specific cadence (call / email / Slack rules).

step.name: compute-budget
step.action: Sum visibility hours/week; cap at 40% of weekly capacity.
step.decision-gate: If budget >40% capacity, cut LOW tier touches or raise prices.

step.name: publish-template
step.action: Pin status update template (5 sections); link from cadence_policy.

step.name: operate
step.action: Run cadence for 4 weeks; track ad-hoc pings.
